titleStmt.title: SII 26.321: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 321. (A.R. No. 303 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva (I): Year 7, Mīṉa (Paṅguṉi)-śu. 10, Sunday, Hastam = 1257 A.D., Feb. 25. But the nakshatra was Punarvasu.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the same temple of the same place occurring in No. 320, above, by Vikkirama-śōḻadēvar alias (name lost), a mudali of the king. The gift of a (cow or buffalo) and a heifer to provide for this by the donor, was accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇas belonging to the 44 circles of the temple who had agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiri
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 7 vatu mīṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu teśamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala
ttu kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr
Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku perumāḷ
cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar mutalikaḷil vikkiramacoḻatevarā
ṉa I
Oṉṟum kiṭāri Oṉṟukkum Innāyaṉār koyil nāṟpattunālu
vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmmaṇarom kaikkoṇṭu Ic
cantiviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavarai Erikka kaṭavomākac cilāle
kai paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom Itu śrīmākecura rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
